'''mataya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumoprotein|pneumoprotein]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-t-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumoprotein|pneumoprotein]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mataya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mætæyæth|mætæyæth]] || [[word:mætæyæj|mætæyæj]] || [[word:mætæyæsh|mætæyæsh]] || [[word:mætæyæ|mætæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:matatayath|matatayath]] || [[word:matatayaj|matatayaj]] || [[word:matatayash|matatayash]] || [[word:matataya|matataya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:matayath|matayath]] || [[word:matayaj|matayaj]] || [[word:matayash|matayash]] || [[word:mataya|mataya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:matafyath|matafyath]] || [[word:matafyaj|matafyaj]] || [[word:matafyash|matafyash]] || [[word:matafyaf|matafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:matayatha|matayatha]] || [[word:matayaja|matayaja]] || [[word:matayasha|matayasha]] || [[word:matayaka|matayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:matayath|matayath]] || [[word:matayaj|matayaj]] || [[word:matayash|matayash]] || [[word:mataya|mataya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:matayathal|matayathal]] || [[word:matayajal|matayajal]] || [[word:matayashal|matayashal]] || [[word:matayakal|matayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:matayathatha|matayathatha]] || [[word:matayajaja|matayajaja]] || [[word:matayashasha|matayashasha]] || [[word:matayaka|matayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:matayathan|matayathan]] || [[word:matayajan|matayajan]] || [[word:matayashan|matayashan]] || [[word:matayakan|matayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:matayathaoro|matayathaoro]] || [[word:matayajaoro|matayajaoro]] || [[word:matayashaoro|matayashaoro]] || [[word:matayakaoro|matayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
